seoTitle: Adelaide vs Adelaide Airport — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Adelaide and Adelaide Airport. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Adelaide vs Adelaide Airport: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Adelaide and Adelaide Airport.
heading: Adelaide vs Adelaide Airport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Adelaide, South Australia and Adelaide Airport, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Adelaide Airport has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Adelaide (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Adelaide or Adelaide Airport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Adelaide has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Adelaide Airport scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Adelaide scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Adelaide Airport scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Adelaide or Adelaide Airport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Adelaide Airport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
